9465:totalOwed.label: Total amount you owe
9465:totalOwed.soTitle: Wadarta canshuurta aad lugta ku haysid
9465:totalOwed.so: Tani waa wadarta guud ee canshuurta aad weli dawladda ka lugta tahay.
9465:totalOwed.en: This is the total tax amount you still owe the government.

9465:downPayment.label: Amount you can pay now
9465:downPayment.so: Tani waa qiimaha lacagta aad hadda diyaar u tahay inaad bixiso, taasoo dhimaysa lacagta soo hartay.
9465:downPayment.en: This is the amount you're able to pay right now, which reduces how much is left on the payment plan.

9465:monthlyPayment.label: Proposed monthly payment
9465:monthlyPayment.so: Tani waa lacagta aad soo jeedinayso inaad bishiiba bixiso ilaa aad dhammaystirto bixinta canshuurta lagaa lugta tahay.
9465:monthlyPayment.en: This is the monthly payment amount you're proposing until the full amount you owe is paid off.

9465:paymentDate.label: Monthly payment date
9465:paymentDate.so: Tani waa maalinta bisha aad doorato inaad lacagta bixiso bil kasta.
9465:paymentDate.en: This is the day of each month you've chosen to make your payment.
